subcodes.first_line: A beam from among the effulgent beams of the Most Generous Name cast its radiance upon the earth; manifest became the bounty and the heavenly feast descended from the ocean of munificence [3.5s]... ...Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! Unto Thee do I repent; Thou art, in truth, the Pardoning, the Munificent…  One of the relatives, named Muhammad Hasan, came to this land, and on his return he bore seventy Tablets for the servants of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: یک تجلی از تجلیات اسم کریم بر ارض پرتو افکند نعمت ظاهر مائده نازل بحر جود
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @petitions to authorities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action, @Word of God is its own standard, @transcendence; unknowability of God
